html:span.class: text-xs bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full border border-indigo-100

html:div.class: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 space-y-4
p-3 bg-indigo-50/50 rounded-xl border border-indigo-100 text-xs text-indigo-900 leading-relaxed font-medium

html:div.html:div: Straight Through Processing (STP) automates booking allocations directly to plants. View pipeline queues below:

html:div.class: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-100 pb-3 last:border-b-0

html:span.class: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-emerald-100

html:div.class: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-100 pb-3 last:border-b-0

html:span.class: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-emerald-100

html:div.class: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-100 pb-3 last:border-b-0

html:span.class: bg-[#fab915]/10 text-amber-700 text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-amber-100
